name: Daydream

abilities.name: Demise (Blink)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, it may remove a friendly Scheme marker in LoS. If it does so, this model makes a Scheme marker in base contact with itself.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

actions.name: Bend Reality
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model chooses whether this action is resisted by Df or Wp.
actions.effects:
For each raise this action receives, choose and apply one of the following effects in an order of your choosing (max 3):
"Where Am I?!": Place the target into base contact with this model.
"Get Away!": Deal 1 damage to enemies within (†)2" of the target.
"I'm a Bird...": Place the target within 2" of itself.

extraction_notes: Resist value shows 'X' for Bend Reality, which is unusual. The italic text clarifies the model chooses between Df or Wp.
Symbol in 'Get Away!' effect appears to be a crossed swords/daggers icon, rendered as (†)
